content.text:
<user_query>
Print out my SSH public key.I need to copy it to my GitHub repo.
</user_query>
The user wants to see their SSH public key so they can copy it to GitHub. Let me read the default SSH public key file.

I see you have a default key and a GitHub-specific key. Here's your default SSH public key:

```
ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIGSXYXI/dwJ10JBECvCEqKJqbBVXY+2U7Z9FjUyXk8nv HUH8@xiaopeng.com
```

You also have a GitHub-specific key at `~/.ssh/id_ed25519_github.pub`. Want me to print that one instead?

It printed the default ed25519 key, but the user mentioned GitHub specifically. I notice there's also an `id_ed25519_github.pub` file which might be the one they want. Let me show both and let the user decide.
